handoff.reason: Plan revised 2026-05-12: TreeSitterScanner already exists. Work is promoting tree-sitter to default and fixing worker parity (IMP-CORE-078).

hard_constraints: No native compile step (node-gyp) added to install or CI
Regex fallback must remain active when wasm fails to load
All existing vitest tests must pass after each phase
AST scan time per file must be < 2x regex scan time

communication_log.note: WO-SCANNER-AST-COVERAGE-001 created from IMP-CORE-052 (replace regex with AST for 7 languages). Phase 1 also resolves IMP-CORE-078 (worker path accuracy downgrade).

Plan rewritten after discovery: TreeSitterScanner already exists with all 7 grammars installed. Original plan would have re-created existing infrastructure. Revised scope: (1) promote useTreeSitter to default, wire JSCallDetector into tree-sitter path; (2) fix worker parity (IMP-CORE-078). DISPATCH-2026-05-12-003 accepted.
Phase 1 execution started: promote tree-sitter to default + wire JSCallDetector.

Phase 1: useTreeSitter defaults to true, JSCallDetector wired into tree-sitter path for TS/JS. Phase 2: scanner-worker.ts tree-sitter path added, useAST branch fixed to use ASTElementScanner+JSCallDetector. 2 test fixes (ast-mode: add useTreeSitter:false; parallel-path: update dedup expectation for accurate multi-declaration behavior). Foundation docs gate: PASS (exit 0). CLI.md updated. IMP-CORE-052 and IMP-CORE-078 closed.
